title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Fire-Boltt - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Fire-Boltt - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Fire-Boltt! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Fire-Boltt:
Fire-Boltt is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fire-Boltt!
